title: the only difference between you and me
description: Lyrics from the only difference between you and me
body:
))}}

written on july 19th, 2021

))}}

))}}

the only difference between me and you
that you're not me and i'm not you
makes all the difference between me and you
what we see and do
what we'll be and what we've been through
i don't know you cuz you're not me
and that's all i know now the rest is copy
filler for the meeting
i'm pitching this to bobby later in the evening
thought i'd bang out a few lines with my coffee
find the through lines
see where it got me and what the fuck caught me
you did, red handed, i was sloppy
now i'm trying to make it look like i planned it
workshopped, shot, and canned it
cuz i don't think you want me when i'm candid

))}}

copy 10-4 good buddy. stay frosty, over and out
i need to wash the interstate off me
the water's colder than i wanted but i know there's a drought
i get in right before i get out
that's where it fit in so that was the route
didn't like the seat i sat in so i set it as a couch
then got back to the business of trucking my doubts
wholesale measure success in accounts
at first i just wanted em out like hotels after check out
but i'm invested now
income from interest had me stressing out
i make money from my work
and i just send it out don't even lend it now
